BatchDeleteTaxRegistration.description: Grants permission to batch delete tax registration data

BatchPutTaxRegistration.description: Grants permission to batch update tax registrations

CancelDocument.description: Grants permission to cancel documents such as withholding slips

CreateDocument.description: Grants permission to upload new documents such as withholding slips

DeleteSupplementalTaxRegistration.description: Grants permission to delete supplemental tax registration data

DeleteTaxRegistration.description: Grants permission to delete tax registration data

GetDocument.description: Grants permission to retrieve documents such as withholding slips

GetDocumentUploadUrl.description: Grants permission to retrieve a generated URL to upload documents

GetExemptions.description: Grants permission to view tax exemptions data

GetTaxInfoReportingDocument.description: Grants permission to view/download tax documents/forms

GetTaxInheritance.description: Grants permission to view tax inheritance status

GetTaxInterview.description: Grants permission to retrieve tax interview data

GetTaxRegistration.description: Grants permission to view tax registrations data

GetTaxRegistrationDocument.description: Grants permission to download tax registration documents

ListDocuments.description: Grants permission to view documents such as withholding slips

ListSupplementalTaxRegistrations.description: Grants permission to view supplemental tax registrations

ListTaxRegistrations.description: Grants permission to view tax registrations

ListWithholdingEligibleInvoices.description: Grants permission to view eligible withholding invoices

PutSupplementalTaxRegistration.description: Grants permission to update supplemental tax registrations data

PutTaxInheritance.description: Grants permission to set tax inheritance

PutTaxInterview.description: Grants permission to update tax interview data

PutTaxRegistration.description: Grants permission to update tax registrations data

UpdateExemptions.description: Grants permission to update tax exemptions data
